ddls:
CREATE TABLE "coatings" (
  "coating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coating */,
  "coating_name" TEXT /* Name of the coating (e.g., Clear Trivalent) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of coating (e.g., Trivalent, Hexavalent) */,
  "salt_spray_duration" TEXT /* Maximum duration under salt spray test */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Relevant ASTM or industry standard for the coating */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the coating in microns */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method used to apply the coating */,
  "curing_time" INTEGER /* Time required for the coating to cure in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "barrels" (
  "barrel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each barrel */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the barrel in liters */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the barrel (e.g., Steel, Plastic) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the barrel is stored */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the barrel (e.g., Good, Damaged) */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the barrel */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the barrel is stored when not in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("barrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racks" (
  "rack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rack */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the rack for holding products */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the rack is situated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the rack (e.g., Available, In Use) */,
  "cleaning_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for cleaning the rack (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection performed on the rack */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "coating_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the coating being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the quality check */,
  "test_parameter" TEXT /* Parameter being tested (e.g., thickness, adhesion) */,
  "test_result_value" REAL /* Actual value of the test result */,
  "test_result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_checks_coating_id FOREIGN KEY ("coating_id") REFERENCES coatings ("coating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "barrel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the barrel being tracked */,
  "rack_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rack being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items in inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "minimum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level for the item */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Point at which the item should be reordered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the item reaches the reorder point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_rack_id FOREIGN KEY ("rack_id") REFERENCES racks ("rack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_barrel_id FOREIGN KEY ("barrel_id") REFERENCES barrels ("barrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for authentication */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., QA, Production, Admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was conducted */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auditor performing the audit */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the audit */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the audit findings */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit performed (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance document */,
  "coating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coating associated with the document */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the compliance document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document's purpose */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance document (e.g., certification, report) */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance document (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_documents_coating_id FOREIGN KEY ("coating_id") REFERENCES coatings ("coating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product being coated */,
  "coating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coating applied to the product */,
  "barrel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the barrel used for coating */,
  "rack_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rack used for drying/storing */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., automotive, industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_coating_id FOREIGN KEY ("coating_id") REFERENCES coatings ("coating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_barrel_id FOREIGN KEY ("barrel_id") REFERENCES barrels ("barrel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_rack_id FOREIGN KEY ("rack_id") REFERENCES racks ("rack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing result */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the test result */,
  "test_parameter" TEXT /* Parameter being tested (e.g., tensile strength, corrosion resistance) */,
  "test_result_value" REAL /* Actual value of the test result */,
  "test_result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_data_sheets" (
  "sds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety data sheet */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material the SDS pertains to */,
  "sds_document_path" TEXT /* File path to the SDS document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the SDS was uploaded */,
  "sds_revision" INTEGER /* Revision number of the SDS */,
  "sds_revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the latest revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sds_id")
)
